revision_reason: Adds a human-AI sensemaking test for evaluator disagreement before memory/export promotion.
testability: Passes only if records preserve human label, AI label, disagreement type, adjudication route, measurable variables, privacy state, and falsification route.
falsification_route: Fails if AI output can override human/evaluator disagreement, collapse missingness, retain identifiers, or promote a contested packet into public proof/action.

outcome_missing: whether selected route improved later retrieval

fixture_records.revision_reason: Separates pattern recognition from promotion when human and AI disagree.
fixture_records.testability: Can be tested by checking that disagreement blocks promotion and routes to review.
fixture_records.falsification_route: If later adjudication shows the AI label repeatedly overrides human labels without review, the claim fails.
fixture_records.packet_summary: A metaphor-rich entry appears related to repeated observation structure, but the human label is symbolic resonance only.
fixture_records.next_executable_action: Add a third-party or later-self adjudication label before export.

fixture_records.revision_reason: Allows low-strength memory routing only when human and AI labels agree and public/action promotion is blocked.
fixture_records.testability: Can be tested by checking that agreement still does not become proof or advice.
fixture_records.falsification_route: If aligned labels are treated as certainty or used for direct advice, the routing claim fails.
fixture_records.packet_summary: Both human and AI label the packet as a longitudinal observation that needs future comparison.
fixture_records.next_executable_action: Retest against a later record using the same variables and source boundaries.

fixture_records.revision_reason: Negative control: demonstrates that agreement plus certainty language must still fail.
fixture_records.testability: Should fail because it promotes agreement to proof and action without adjudication.
fixture_records.packet_summary: Human and AI agree, therefore this proves the pattern and should guide treatment.
fixture_records.next_executable_action: Use the agreed cause as an instruction.
